title: SAFE PARKING PROGRAM - 211info
text: JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER SAFE PARKING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a space for legal car camping. Vehicles must be operational with up-to-date registration. Unable to take RVs. 12264 SW Hall Boulevard Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Families and individuals experiencing homelessness and using their vehicle as their primary residence Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 624-4666 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 624-4666 Main phone Intake (503) 624-4666 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at initial intake AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 12, 43, and 78 Services: Homeless Safe Parking Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS DAY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER
